data.popupTitle: New essential reading for STIR desks

data.descriptionText:
Your chance to win a $247 Starbucks gift card

Post a screenshot* of your Crypto futures and options watchlists or charts on X using #CME247CryptoGiveaway, tag @CMEActiveTrader and fill out the form below before Sunday, May 31, 2026, at 11:59 p.m. ET.

*Don’t share sensitive data in your screenshot.

NO PURCHASE OR TRADE NECESSARY. Winners will be chosen at random. By participating in this random drawing, the registrant is providing consent to electronic communications in accordance with the CME Group Privacy Notice. To learn more visit Privacy Center. Void where prohibited. Open to legal residents of the US, 18+. Begins 5/29/26 at 65:00 PM ET and ends 5/31/26 at 11:59 PM ET. Limit 1 entry per person. Twenty (20) Prizes will be awarded, each consisting of a $247.00 Starbucks e-Gift Card. Total ARV of all prizes: $4,940.00. Winners selected via random drawing on or about June 1, 2026. Starbucks is not a sponsor of or participant in this promotion.

data.name: Introduction to CME FedWatch
data.long_description: Gain a better understanding of our most popular tool, the CME FedWatch tool, which uses 30-Day Fed Fund futures prices to gauge the probability of an upcoming rate hike.
